Character Dialogue (One-Way): (Screen fades in from black. Sound of a rooster.)
Game Mechanic: POV Start: Player gains control of movement.

Character Dialogue (One-Way): Martha: "Morning, sunshine. You were tossing and turning again. Dreaming of your father? Folks say he was a legend, but nobody can agree if he wore a badge or a bandana.""Anyway, dreams don't buy flour. Do me a favor? Go to the Bank and withdraw our gold for the week. I need to hit the Emporium."

Doc Sawbones: "Hold it there, kid. You look a bit green. You've only got 5 Life Points. If you get into a duel and lose 'em, you'll wake up right back here. I'll have to charge you gold for the stitches... and if you're broke, I'll be taking some of your gear as payment."
Game Mechanic: Tutorial: Explanation of the Respawn/Penalty mechanic.

Character Dialogue (One-Way): Silas (The Thief): (Bursts out of the doors, knocking the player back) "Watch it, kid! I'm on a schedule. Don't look at me like that—this gold is insured! Insurance is the real thief here!" (Silas flees; a metallic 'clink' is heard as he drops an object).

Bank Owner: "Coward! Someone stop him! Sighs. This town needs a Sheriff with some grit. Our current one is half-blind."(Pointing to the ground) "Is that his iron? Pick it up, kid. If you're going to the Old Mine to get that gold back, you'll need more than luck."
Game Mechanic: Item Get: First Permanent Skill: [Rusty Peacemaker].
